languages.text: "Моя группа прибыла на станцию Тиркуаз-4 один планетарный цикл назад. За время присутствия мной, командующей скитариями, был проведен тайный протокол проверки священных механизмов станции. Были обнаружены..." {n}Техножрица переходит на пронзительный вой:{/n} "Нарушения универсальных законов 5-ой степени! Артизан Декабалус-4-16 осквернил священный механизм центральной буровой вышки станции "Тиркуаз-4" ксеногенной ересью, обозначенной как "анкер-ядро". Протоколы предписывают немедленное уничтожение механизмов, имевших связь с ксенотехом!"

"My unit arrived on Tirkuaz-4 one planetary cycle ago. During our time here, I, as the commander of the Skitarii, performed a covert-protocols inspection of the station's sacred mechanisms. I detected..." {n}The Tech-Priest's voice shifts to a shrill howl.{/n} "Violations of the Universal Laws to the fifth degree! Artisan Decabalus-4-16 has desecrated the sacred mechanism of the central drill complex of Tirkuaz-4 with a xenogenic heresy identified as the 'anchor-core.' Protocols stipulate the immediate destruction of the mechanisms that have come into contact with this xenotech!"
languages.original_text: "Моя группа прибыла на станцию Тиркуаз-4 один планетарный цикл назад. languages.text: 「我らのグループはティルクアズ4に1つの惑星の周期前に到着した。我らがここに滞在する間、アルファ・スキタリアスである私は、この要塞の聖なる機構の秘密検査を行った。そして、私は検知した…」{n}テクプリストの声は鋭い悲鳴に変わる。{/n}「宇宙の法則に反する行為が5度も！ユニット・アーティザン・デカバラス4-16は、ティルクアズ4の中心ドリル機の聖なる機構を、異種生物の異端であるアンカーコアによって汚染した。この異種技術に接触した機構は、即座に破壊されるべきである！」
languages.original_text: "My unit arrived on Tirkuaz-4 one planetary cycle ago. During our time here, I, as the commander of the Skitarii, performed a covert-protocols inspection of the station's sacred mechanisms. I detected..." {n}The Tech-Priest's voice shifts to a shrill howl.{/n} "Violations of the Universal Laws to the fifth degree! Protocols stipulate the immediate destruction of the mechanisms that have come into contact with this xenotech!"

「我らのグループはティルクアズ4に1つの惑星の周期前に到着した。我らがここに滞在する間、アルファ・スキタリアスである私は、この要塞の聖なる機構の秘密検査を行った。そして、私は検知した…」{n}テクプリストの声は鋭い悲鳴に変わる。{/n}「宇宙の法則に反する行為が5度も！ユニット・アーティザン・デカバラス4-16は、ティルクアズ4の中心ドリル機の聖なる機構を、異種生物の異端であるアンカーコアによって汚染した。この異種技術に接触した機構は、即座に破壊されるべきである！」

languages.text: «Mi unidad llegó a Tirkuaz 4 hace un ciclo planetario. Durante nuestra estancia, como comandante de los Skitarii he ejecutado un protocolo de inspección encubierta de los mecanismos sagrados de la estación. El resultado del análisis revela...». {n}El tono de la tecnosacerdotisa pasa a ser un aullido estridente:{/n} «¡Violaciones de las Leyes Universales en quinto grado! La unidad artesana Decabalus-4-16 ha profanado el mecanismo sagrado del complejo perforador central de Tirkuaz 4 con una herejía xenogénica designada el "núcleo de anclaje". ¡Los protocolos estipulan la destrucción inmediata de cualquier mecanismo que haya entrado en contacto con esta xenotecnología!»
languages.original_text: "My unit arrived on Tirkuaz-4 one planetary cycle ago. During our time here, I, as the commander of the Skitarii, performed a covert-protocols inspection of the station's sacred mechanisms. I detected..." {n}The Tech-Priest's voice shifts to a shrill howl.{/n} "Violations of the Universal Laws to the fifth degree! Artisan Decabalus-4-16 has desecrated the sacred mechanism of the central drill complex of Tirkuaz-4 with a xenogenic heresy identified as the 'anchor-core.' Protocols stipulate the immediate destruction of the mechanisms that have come into contact with this xenotech!"

traits.locale_text: «Mi unidad llegó a Tirkuaz 4 hace un ciclo planetario. Durante nuestra estancia, como comandante de los Skitarii he ejecutado un protocolo de inspección encubierta de los mecanismos sagrados de la estación. El resultado del análisis revela...». {n}El tono de la tecnosacerdotisa pasa a ser un aullido estridente:{/n} «¡Violaciones de las Leyes Universales en quinto grado! La unidad artesana Decabalus-4-16 ha profanado el mecanismo sagrado del complejo perforador central de Tirkuaz 4 con una herejía xenogénica designada el "núcleo de anclaje". ¡Los protocolos estipulan la destrucción inmediata de cualquier mecanismo que haya entrado en contacto con esta xenotecnología!»

languages.text: “我的小队在一个行星周期前抵达提库阿兹4号。在此期间，作为护教军的指挥官，我对星站的神圣机械执行了秘密检查协议。我发现……”{n}技术神甫的声音骤然转为刺耳的尖啸：{/n}“存在普适准则五级违规行为！匠人德卡巴洛斯-4-16用一种被识别为‘锚核’的异形造物，亵渎了提库阿兹4号中央钻探中枢的神圣机械！协议规定，必须立即销毁与此异形科技接触过的机械！”
languages.original_text: "My unit arrived on Tirkuaz-4 one planetary cycle ago. During our time here, I, as the commander of the Skitarii, performed a covert-protocols inspection of the station's sacred mechanisms. I detected..." {n}The Tech-Priest's voice shifts to a shrill howl.{/n} "Violations of the Universal Laws to the fifth degree! Artisan Decabalus-4-16 has desecrated the sacred mechanism of the central drill complex of Tirkuaz-4 with a xenogenic heresy identified as the 'anchor-core.' Protocols stipulate the immediate destruction of the mechanisms that have come into contact with this xenotech!"

languages.text: "Meine Einheit traf vor einem Planetenzyklus auf Tirkuaz-4 ein. Während unserer Zeit hier habe ich als Kommandeurin der Skitarii eine verdeckte Inspektion der heiligen Mechanismen der Station durchgeführt. Dabei stieß ich auf ..." {n}Die Stimme der Techpriesterin wird zu einem schrillen Kreischen.{/n} "Grad-5-Verletzungen der Universalgesetze! Artifex Decabalus-4-16 hat die heiligen Mechanismen des zentralen Bohrkomplexes von Tirkuaz-4 mit einer xenogenen Ketzerei entweiht, die als 'Ankerkern' identifiziert wurde. Die Protokolle sehen in diesem Fall die sofortige Zerstörung aller Mechanismen vor, die mit dieser Xenotech in Berührung kamen!"
languages.original_text: "My unit arrived on Tirkuaz-4 one planetary cycle ago. During our time here, I, as the commander of the Skitarii, performed a covert-protocols inspection of the station's sacred mechanisms. I detected..." {n}The Tech-Priest's voice shifts to a shrill howl.{/n} "Violations of the Universal Laws to the fifth degree! Artisan Decabalus-4-16 has desecrated the sacred mechanism of the central drill complex of Tirkuaz-4 with a xenogenic heresy identified as the 'anchor-core.' Protocols stipulate the immediate destruction of the mechanisms that have come into contact with this xenotech!"

Dabei stieß ich auf ..." {n}Die Stimme der Techpriesterin wird zu einem schrillen Kreischen.{/n} "Grad-5-Verletzungen der Universalgesetze! Die Protokolle sehen in diesem Fall die sofortige Zerstörung aller Mechanismen vor, die mit dieser Xenotech in Berührung kamen!"

languages.text: "Birimim, Tirkuaz-4'e bir gezegen döngüsü önce vardı. Burada geçirdiğimiz süre boyunca Skitariusların komutanı olarak istasyonun kutsal mekanizmalarında gizli protokoller uyguladım. Tespit ettiğim..." {n}Tekno Rahip'in sesi tiz bir ulumaya dönüşüyor.{/n} "Evrensel Yasaların beşinci dereceden ihlalleri! Zanaatkâr Decabalus-4-16, Tirkuaz-4'ün merkezî sondaj kompleksinin kutsal mekanizmasını, 'çapa çekirdeği' olarak tanımlanan zeno kaynaklı bir kâfirlikle kirletti! Protokoller, bu zeno teknolojisi ile temas etmiş mekanizmaların derhâl imha edilmesini şart koşuyor!"
languages.original_text: "My unit arrived on Tirkuaz-4 one planetary cycle ago. During our time here, I, as the commander of the Skitarii, performed a covert-protocols inspection of the station's sacred mechanisms. I detected..." {n}The Tech-Priest's voice shifts to a shrill howl.{/n} "Violations of the Universal Laws to the fifth degree! Artisan Decabalus-4-16 has desecrated the sacred mechanism of the central drill complex of Tirkuaz-4 with a xenogenic heresy identified as the 'anchor-core.' Protocols stipulate the immediate destruction of the mechanisms that have come into contact with this xenotech!"

Protokoller, bu zeno teknolojisi ile temas etmiş mekanizmaların derhâl imha edilmesini şart koşuyor!"

languages.text: « Mon unité est arrivée sur Tirkuaz-4 il y a un cycle planétaire. Pendant notre séjour, à la tête des Skitarii, j'ai effectué une inspection secrète des protocoles des mécanismes sacrés de la station. J'ai détecté… » {n}La voix de la technoprêtresse devient un hurlement strident :{/n} « Des infractions au cinquième degré des Lois Universelles ! L'artisan Décabalus-4-16 a profané le mécanisme sacré du complexe central de Tirkuaz-4 à l'aide d'une hérésie xénogénétique appelée "noyau ancestral". Les protocoles exigent la destruction immédiate des mécanismes entrés en contact avec cette xénotechnologie ! »
languages.original_text: "My unit arrived on Tirkuaz-4 one planetary cycle ago. During our time here, I, as the commander of the Skitarii, performed a covert-protocols inspection of the station's sacred mechanisms. I detected..." {n}The Tech-Priest's voice shifts to a shrill howl.{/n} "Violations of the Universal Laws to the fifth degree! Artisan Decabalus-4-16 has desecrated the sacred mechanism of the central drill complex of Tirkuaz-4 with a xenogenic heresy identified as the 'anchor-core.' Protocols stipulate the immediate destruction of the mechanisms that have come into contact with this xenotech!"
